ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cells" (
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell */,
  "cell_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of the cell (e.g., epithelial, neuronal) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the image data */,
  "cell_description" TEXT /* Description of the cell */,
  "cell_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the cell */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the cell was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the cell was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cells_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cells_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., microscopy, 3D scan) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_format" TEXT /* Format of the data source (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., brightfield, fluorescence) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "morphology_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cell */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the cell */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the cell */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the cell */,
  "surface_area" REAL /* Surface area of the cell */,
  "perimeter" REAL /* Perimeter of the cell */,
  "aspect_ratio" REAL /* Aspect ratio of the cell */,
  "circularity" REAL /* Circularity of the cell */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_morphology_metrics_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cells ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orientations" (
  "orientation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each orientation */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cell */,
  "x_axis" REAL /* X-axis orientation */,
  "y_axis" REAL /* Y-axis orientation */,
  "z_axis" REAL /* Z-axis orientation */,
  "roll" REAL /* Roll angle of the cell */,
  "pitch" REAL /* Pitch angle of the cell */,
  "yaw" REAL /* Yaw angle of the cell */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orientation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orientations_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cells ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cell */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cells ("cell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cell */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date of annotation */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., note, comment, tag) */,
  "annotation_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cells ("cell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cell */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_categories_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cells ("cell_id")
)
column_names: Type of the cell (e.g., epithelial, neuronal)
Date and time the cell was created
Date and time the cell was last updated
Unique identifier for each data source
Type of the data source (e.g., microscopy, 3D scan)
Format of the data source (e.g., CSV, JSON)
Type of the image (e.g., brightfield, fluorescence)
Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG)
Size of the image in bytes
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator)
Date and time of the user's last login
Date and time the user was created
Date and time the user was last updated
Unique identifier for each access event
Type of annotation (e.g., note, comment, tag)
